candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Balancing/subtotal line, not preferred over the explicitly reported total.
Wrong section; non-current assets are not current assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported current-assets total.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of period
candidates.why: Cash-flow reconciliation line, but CHE should come from the balance sheet when available.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at beginning of period
candidates.why: Not the balance-sheet period-end cash target.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash line. Duplicate label appears in preview, but the explicit balance-sheet row label is still the correct choice.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Best direct balance-sheet measure of short-term debt; clean interest-bearing current borrowing line and excludes leases.
Debt-maturity schedule line, but potentially broader/less clean than the direct current interest-bearing liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Current portion of long-term interest-bearing liabilities
candidates.why: Would be relevant for current maturities of long-term debt, but shown as blank in preview and may not be consistently populated.
Explicitly lease-related and should be excluded from STD under the baseline rule.

variables.notes: Chose a confident label outside the shortlist because it is the cleanest direct short-term debt line and excludes lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Best direct match for taxes payable/current tax liabilities payable.

candidates.row_label: VAT and other indirect tax payables
candidates.why: Indirect tax payable, but narrower and not the standard income-tax-payable target.
Tax asset, opposite of payable/liability.

variables.notes: Selected a confident label outside the shortlist because TXP targets payable/current tax liabilities, and this is the clearest match.

candidates.why: Exact total/net PPE line on the balance sheet; preferred.
Only a component/alternative tangible-assets line, not as clean as the total PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Sale of PPE and Non-Current Financial Investments
candidates.why: Cash-flow line, not a balance-sheet PPE stock measure.

variables.notes: Used the explicit balance-sheet PPE total.

candidates.why: Exact match for total assets.
Balances to assets but is not the preferred assets label.
Not total assets.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.
Operating cash flow before some cash items/working-capital effects in some formats; less clearly the final net operating cash flow line.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flows from operating activities

variables.notes: Preferred the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line over the broader 'Cash flows from operations' subtotal.
